## Use Case

Describe your one-handed typing situation or constraint as much as you are
comfortable sharing.

## What Worked

What felt useful, fast, comfortable, or easy to learn?

## What Was Difficult

What caused fatigue, confusion, missed input, or setup difficulty?

## Suggested Improvement

What would make Fujin more usable for you?
